openingMessage: Today we own our day before it owns us. Every crew out there is counting on the person next to them. Let's make sure we're worth counting on.
leadershipThought: Ownership isn't a title. It's what you do when no one's watching and the easy path is right in front of you.
opsContent:
Active Jobs (2026-06-15):
• Larry Taylor — SM Energy Cosmo 213 (6:26 AM): workover tripping back in, acid job, scan coming back out of hole, will test going back in
• Edward Carrillo — TB ROCKER B N 1-119H (6:43 AM): arrived, waiting on MT and crew
• Dawson Drake — Rig down complete, heading to shop (7:07 AM)
• Jacob Hernandez — Arrived on Donovan (7:08 AM)
• Brianda Sandoval — Leaving Exxon office → Strain CGLS for well testing (8:16 AM); also noted heading to Cassidy CTB CGLS earlier
• Stefanie Kirschke — Job cancelled, heading back (8:21 AM)
• Alex Clubb — On site, only crew present ~20 min before 9:00 AM
• Marylou Guerra — Arrived at Chicken Noodle "NORM" (8:40 AM)
• Cindy Smith — Arrived at Orel Hershiser (11:12 AM)
• Nathan Contreras / Caleb Smith — Jobs complete, returning to shop/yard (~11:35–11:49 AM)
• Michael Hutt — SM Coonskin 1500 NM pull: #122 at 10,000; #152 at 3,000 (4:25 PM)
• Justin Pack — Shift change with BJ on First Tee Pad (4:28 PM)
• Jordan Lemmons — Grease unit arrived on location (5:02 PM); Michael Hutt confirmed handover complete, returning to man camp
• Raymundo "Ray" Solis — Done at Pratt Vaughn (7:21 PM)
• Jeremy Torrence (Jun 15 — message cut off): Seinfeld Yada — 611 shut in, 614 (incomplete)
• Trailer 605 BM 5: [name cut off]
• Jordan & David Z — Trailer 606 BM 6
• Larry & Joseph — Trailer 503 BM 13
• Louie, Emma, Jane — NORM Trailer 504
• Marylou & Ralph — Chicken Noodle CTB NORM Trailer 600
• Well testing: Bri & David H

Carry-Forward:
• GPS coordinate error with Exxon — confirm Robert Wright reached correct location; follow up with Orlando Ibarra if needed
• H2S measurement accuracy concern (Justin Pack) — needs follow-up; unclear if equipment issue or H2S-in-liquid phenomenon
• Jeremy Torrence's Jun 15 message (Seinfeld Yada / 611 shut in 614) was cut off — verify full status
• Crew reminded: communicate all movements after job completion; always ready to pivot
• Morning meeting: 5:30 AM
lessonsLearned:
• Wrong location — Robert Wright (8:21–8:29 AM): GPS coordinates from Exxon were incorrect; Robert arrived at wrong location. Mike messaged that Orlando Ibarra would call him. Mike reminded crew: post "no one in location" when crew arrival is delayed so dispatch can assist.
• H2S reading discrepancy — Justin Pack (11:30 AM): Flagged that H2S readings have not been correct — gas embedded in water/oil is not breaking out. H2S from gas testing is ~18,000–20,000 ppm off from water and oil sample readings. *(Safety concern — may need follow-up on measurement methodology or equipment.)*
